## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Rimkus and GrowthX to discuss content strategy progress and next steps for BES-focused blog content.](https://fathom.video/share/Ssx-H3un3Nrd6M5ppjAkAKsxZV3P4A2t?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content strategy focuses on 4 clusters: structural engineering, due diligence, MEP consulting, and energy efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/Ssx-H3un3Nrd6M5ppjAkAKsxZV3P4A2t?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Team to approve 20-30 blog topics from \~100 proposed; aiming for 5 new blogs/week](https://fathom.video/share/Ssx-H3un3Nrd6M5ppjAkAKsxZV3P4A2t?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [First batch: 5 blogs (2 structural, 1 each from other clusters) for voice/tone calibration](https://fathom.video/share/Ssx-H3un3Nrd6M5ppjAkAKsxZV3P4A2t?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [Executive summary needed for BES leaders (content-rich) and C-suite (high-level progress)](https://fathom.video/share/Ssx-H3un3Nrd6M5ppjAkAKsxZV3P4A2t?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
  - [Content audit reveals opportunity for pruning to improve SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/Ssx-H3un3Nrd6M5ppjAkAKsxZV3P4A2t?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Clusters

  - [4 main clusters: structural engineering, due diligence, MEP consulting, energy efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/Ssx-H3un3Nrd6M5ppjAkAKsxZV3P4A2t?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Energy efficiency integrated across all clusters, not isolated](https://fathom.video/share/Ssx-H3un3Nrd6M5ppjAkAKsxZV3P4A2t?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [Keyword research balances volume (40-high) and difficulty (0-100 scale)](https://fathom.video/share/Ssx-H3un3Nrd6M5ppjAkAKsxZV3P4A2t?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [\~100 blog topics proposed; team to approve 20-30 to start](https://fathom.video/share/Ssx-H3un3Nrd6M5ppjAkAKsxZV3P4A2t?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)

### Content Production and Approval Process

  - [Initial batch: 5 blogs (2 structural, 1 each from other clusters) for calibration](https://fathom.video/share/Ssx-H3un3Nrd6M5ppjAkAKsxZV3P4A2t?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [Scaling to 5 new blogs/week after initial feedback](https://fathom.video/share/Ssx-H3un3Nrd6M5ppjAkAKsxZV3P4A2t?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
  - [Team to use Airtable for topic approval (commenting access)](https://fathom.video/share/Ssx-H3un3Nrd6M5ppjAkAKsxZV3P4A2t?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [Google Docs for content review; automations for email notifications](https://fathom.video/share/Ssx-H3un3Nrd6M5ppjAkAKsxZV3P4A2t?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)

### Performance Tracking

  - [Looker Studio dashboard (8 pages) connected to Google Search Console and GA4](https://fathom.video/share/Ssx-H3un3Nrd6M5ppjAkAKsxZV3P4A2t?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
  - [Scrunch dashboard for AI tool visibility (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity)](https://fathom.video/share/Ssx-H3un3Nrd6M5ppjAkAKsxZV3P4A2t?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)

### Content Audit and Refresh Strategy

  - [Spreadsheet of existing articles with SEMrush keyword data](https://fathom.video/share/Ssx-H3un3Nrd6M5ppjAkAKsxZV3P4A2t?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Prioritizing refreshes based on BES relevance and recent traffic loss](https://fathom.video/share/Ssx-H3un3Nrd6M5ppjAkAKsxZV3P4A2t?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
  - [Typical mix: 3 new pieces, 2 refreshes per week (flexible based on effort)](https://fathom.video/share/Ssx-H3un3Nrd6M5ppjAkAKsxZV3P4A2t?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)

### Content Pruning

  - [Identified issue with duplicative seasonal content](https://fathom.video/share/Ssx-H3un3Nrd6M5ppjAkAKsxZV3P4A2t?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
  - [Pruning can improve overall site SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/Ssx-H3un3Nrd6M5ppjAkAKsxZV3P4A2t?tab=summary&timestamp=1491.0)
  - [Team to make recommendations for content removal or consolidation](https://fathom.video/share/Ssx-H3un3Nrd6M5ppjAkAKsxZV3P4A2t?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Aida to prepare executive summary for BES leaders and C-suite](https://fathom.video/share/Ssx-H3un3Nrd6M5ppjAkAKsxZV3P4A2t?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
  - [Rimkus team to approve initial batch of blog topics](https://fathom.video/share/Ssx-H3un3Nrd6M5ppjAkAKsxZV3P4A2t?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin content production on approved topics](https://fathom.video/share/Ssx-H3un3Nrd6M5ppjAkAKsxZV3P4A2t?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)
  - [Design team to provide featured image examples for review](https://fathom.video/share/Ssx-H3un3Nrd6M5ppjAkAKsxZV3P4A2t?tab=summary&timestamp=1622.0)
  - [Aida to make pruning suggestions for existing article URLs](https://fathom.video/share/Ssx-H3un3Nrd6M5ppjAkAKsxZV3P4A2t?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
  - [Rimkus team to continue adding relevant brand materials to shared resources](https://fathom.video/share/Ssx-H3un3Nrd6M5ppjAkAKsxZV3P4A2t?tab=summary&timestamp=1666.0)
